_note: PHASE 2 - eval for the calibrated + p95-tuned 2D GORGO model. ms-normalized model: score = rtt_weight*rtt_ms + prefill_rate*uncached + queue_rate*queue_weight*queued. Sequencer patches the calibrated prefill_rate/queue_rate (from PHASE 0) AND the learned rtt_weight/queue_weight (from PHASE 1) into gorgo-static-p95-2d; gorgo-autotune-2d re-fits rates online. Window: apr7 19:45-20:15 (decoded eval).
